name: Founder Fubon Fund Mgmnt Co Ltd. - Csi Consumer Staples Bonus Index Fund
summary: Founder Fubon Fund Mgmnt Co Ltd. - Csi Consumer Staples Bonus Index Fund is a fund managed by Founder Fubon Fund Management that tracks the CSI Consumer Staples Bonus Index. The fund invests in companies in the consumer staples sector that are known for paying dividends, aiming to provide income and capital appreciation.
